docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SONA GEMS, INC. SERVED DEC-23-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT C.S.D.S. JEWELRY, INC., DBA BAZCO
